source: Stage Two T3 covariates for WA 2014 prefectures. Population density and road connectivity from country-level proxies (Guinea, Liberia, Sierra Leone); capital cities receive urban overrides (Conakry, Monrovia, Freetown). Healthcare distance from country-level rural mean. Conflict access score = 1 (peacetime WA 2014 in Mode A backtest window).

geographies.derivation_notes: WA 2014 prefecture in GUINEA. Country-level proxies (population density, road connectivity, healthcare distance, conflict access) applied per Stage Two methodology; capital cities receive urban overrides. Prefecture-level differentiation is a Stage Three follow-up.
